title: Fake Dragon Egg
description: Texture pack for fake dragon egg.
body:
• I apologize in advance if my translation is wrong because I am using a
﻿translator.

• TexturePack is designed to troll your friends
as it replaces the texture "red nether brick wall" on the dragon egg as well as the name of the item.

• You can distinguish the dragon egg by the sounds, hitboxes as well as by the ID of the object.

• that's all😀
